title: Injured Stray Dog Hit by Car Recovers After One Month of Treatment
description: This video shows the before and after journey of a stray dog severely injured by a car accident that damaged its spine. Initially weak and unable to move properly on the streets, the dog receives proper veterinary care and treatment. After one month, it demonstrates significant improvement, walking again and receiving affection from its rescuer. The footage emphasizes the critical need for timely medical intervention to prevent permanent disability in injured animals and includes a call to support such rescue efforts through donations and sharing. #StrayDogRescue #AnimalRecovery #DogRehabilitation #BeforeAndAfter #AnimalWelfare #SpineInjury #VeterinaryCare #StrayAnimalHelp #RescueStory #SaveDogs #CompassionateCare #PetRescue
